summary: Comprehensive testing of Speaking Mirror marketing agency website completed successfully. All 6 pages load correctly, navigation works, contact form API saves to MongoDB, all 5 portfolio project detail pages render correctly, category filtering works, mobile responsiveness verified, and no console errors found.

issues: 'Influencer Marketing' category (used by India Restaurant project) is not included in the filter tabs - projects with this category only appear in 'All' view

action_items: Consider adding 'Influencer Marketing' to the category filter tabs on The Work page to match the portfolio data
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Test contact submissions created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Homepage with race intro animation (skip button works), all 6 navigation links, Our Story page with 16 team members and office carousel, Capabilities page with 7 services, The Work page with category filtering (5 projects), WorkDetail pages for all 5 projects (IDs: 1, 8, 9, 10, 11), Brands page, Contact page with form submission to MongoDB API, Footer on all pages, mobile responsiveness verified. No console errors on any page.
